fmiModelDescription.description: Adapts plant outputs into the software control-signal bundle.

ScalarVariable.name: LHexTout.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: sWsignals.Aircraft_State
ScalarVariable.description: Canonical ECS software input bundle normalized from external SSP naming.

ScalarVariable.name: sWsignals.TLiquid
ScalarVariable.description: Canonical ECS software input bundle normalized from external SSP naming.
